@testing-library/react.message: Import from @ksp-gonogo/test-utils instead — its render/renderHook supply the theme every kit primitive needs (pass `wrapper` to add providers on top), and it re-exports the rest of Testing Library unchanged. Testing Library also auto-cleans after every test, so a manual cleanup import/call is redundant and masks real teardown bugs.

styled-components.message: Migrated widgets carry zero bespoke CSS — compose @ksp-gonogo/ui-kit primitives + layout + tokens instead. See local_docs/telemetry-mod/ui-kit-design.md.
